tripOverview.intro: San Juan combines Old World charm with Caribbean flair, offering cobblestone streets, vibrant culture, and stunning beaches. This romantic island paradise provides the perfect blend of history, nightlife, and relaxation for couples seeking adventure.
tripOverview.vibe: A perfect blend of romantic sunsets, cultural exploration, and pristine beaches with welcoming LGBTQ+ friendly venues throughout San Juan.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April offers perfect weather with warm temperatures, minimal rainfall, and comfortable humidity levels ideal for beach activities.

attractions.name: Old San Juan
attractions.desc: Historic colonial fortress city with colorful buildings and cobblestone streets.

attractions.name: El Yunque National Forest
attractions.desc: Tropical rainforest with waterfalls and hiking trails.

attractions.name: Condado Beach
attractions.desc: Popular beach district with restaurants and nightlife.

attractions.name: Camuy Caves
attractions.desc: Underground cave system with guided tours.

attractions.name: Bioluminescent Bay
attractions.desc: Glowing waters created by microscopic organisms.

destinationOverview.transportation: San Juan offers reliable public transportation including buses and the Tren Urbano metro system connecting major areas. Taxis and ride-sharing services like Uber are widely available and affordable for short distances. Rental cars are recommended for exploring beyond the metro area and visiting attractions like El Yunque.
destinationOverview.tip: Download the Uber app as it's more reliable than local taxis, and always carry cash as some smaller vendors don't accept cards - stick to well-lit tourist areas at night.
destinationOverview.safety: San Juan is generally safe for tourists, especially in main tourist areas, but exercise normal precautions and avoid isolated areas at night.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with an eSIM for seamless navigation, restaurant bookings, and sharing your romantic moments instantly.

days.intro: Touch down in paradise and explore the historic charm of Old San Juan's colorful colonial streets.

morning.name: Arrival at San Juan Airport
morning.desc: Land and take transport to accommodation in Condado area.

afternoon.name: Old San Juan Walking Tour
afternoon.desc: Explore historic forts, colorful buildings, and cobblestone streets.

afternoon.name: Castillo San Felipe del Morro
afternoon.desc: Visit the iconic fortress with stunning ocean views.

evening.name: Dinner at Café Puerto Rico
evening.desc: Traditional Puerto Rican cuisine in a romantic historic setting.

days.tip: Book dinner reservations in advance and wear comfortable walking shoes for the cobblestone streets.

days.intro: Soak up the sun at pristine Isla Verde Beach with crystal clear waters and soft white sand.

morning.name: Isla Verde Beach
morning.desc: Relax on one of Puerto Rico's most beautiful beaches.

morning.name: Beach Volleyball
morning.desc: Join locals for a friendly game or watch from the sidelines.

afternoon.name: Water Sports Rental
afternoon.desc: Try paddleboarding or kayaking in the calm waters.

afternoon.name: Beachside Massage
afternoon.desc: Couples massage on the beach for ultimate relaxation.

evening.name: Sunset at Isla Verde
evening.desc: Watch a romantic sunset with cocktails from a beach bar.

days.tip: Apply sunscreen frequently and stay hydrated - the Caribbean sun is stronger than it feels with the ocean breeze.

days.intro: Discover the magic of the only tropical rainforest in the US National Forest System.

morning.name: Depart for El Yunque
morning.desc: Scenic drive to the rainforest with rental car or tour bus.

morning.name: La Mina Trail Hike
morning.desc: Easy hike to beautiful La Mina waterfall through lush forest.

afternoon.name: Waterfall Swimming
afternoon.desc: Take a refreshing dip in the natural pools.

afternoon.name: El Portal Visitor Center
afternoon.desc: Learn about rainforest ecology and local wildlife.

afternoon.name: Yokahú Tower
afternoon.desc: Climb the observation tower for panoramic forest views.

evening.name: Return to San Juan
evening.desc: Drive back with stops at scenic viewpoints along the way.

days.tip: Bring water shoes for waterfall areas and a waterproof bag for electronics - afternoon showers are common in the rainforest.

days.intro: Experience the upscale Condado district with its beautiful lagoon, beach, and cultural attractions.

morning.name: Condado Beach Walk
morning.desc: Stroll along the pristine beach with Art Deco hotels as backdrop.

morning.name: Condado Lagoon Kayak
morning.desc: Paddle through the calm lagoon surrounded by mangroves.

afternoon.name: Museo de Arte de Puerto Rico
afternoon.desc: Explore Puerto Rican art from colonial times to contemporary.

afternoon.name: Shopping on Ashford Avenue
afternoon.desc: Browse boutiques and local designer shops in upscale Condado.

evening.name: Happy Hour at La Placita
evening.desc: Start the evening at this popular nightlife district.

evening.name: LGBTQ+ Night at Krash Klub
evening.desc: Dance the night away at San Juan's premier gay club.

days.tip: La Placita gets very crowded on weekends, so arrive early for the best atmosphere and easier navigation.

days.intro: Take a day trip to pristine Culebra Island for some of the world's most beautiful beaches.

morning.name: Ferry to Culebra
morning.desc: Early morning ferry from Fajardo to Culebra Island.

morning.name: Flamenco Beach
morning.desc: Arrive at one of the world's most beautiful beaches.

afternoon.name: Snorkeling at Carlos Rosario
afternoon.desc: Discover colorful coral reefs and tropical fish.

afternoon.name: Beach Picnic Lunch
afternoon.desc: Enjoy a romantic lunch on pristine white sand.

afternoon.name: Tamarindo Beach
afternoon.desc: Visit this quieter beach for more intimate moments.

evening.name: Return Ferry
evening.desc: Sunset ferry ride back to the main island.

days.tip: Bring your own snorkeling gear to save money and ensure a good fit - rental options on the island are limited.

days.intro: Immerse yourself in local culture at traditional markets and end with a romantic sunset experience.

morning.name: Mercado de Río Piedras
morning.desc: Explore authentic local market with tropical fruits and crafts.

morning.name: Casa Blanca Museum
morning.desc: Visit the historic home of Ponce de León's family.

afternoon.name: Paseo de la Princesa
afternoon.desc: Romantic walk along the waterfront promenade.

afternoon.name: Ron del Barrilito Distillery
afternoon.desc: Tour and tasting at Puerto Rico's premium rum distillery.

evening.name: Sunset at San Juan Gate
evening.desc: Watch the sunset from this historic city entrance.

evening.name: Romantic Dinner at Santaella
evening.desc: Contemporary Puerto Rican cuisine in an intimate setting.

days.tip: Bargaining is acceptable at local markets, but be respectful and don't push too hard on already reasonable prices.

days.intro: Your final full day focuses on romantic experiences and relaxation before departure.

morning.name: Couples Spa Treatment
morning.desc: Indulge in a relaxing spa experience together.

morning.name: Ocean Park Beach
morning.desc: Enjoy a quieter, more local beach experience.

afternoon.name: Late Lunch at Verde Mesa
afternoon.desc: Vegetarian-friendly restaurant with creative plant-based dishes.

afternoon.name: Cueva Ventana
afternoon.desc: Cave tour with spectacular valley views from the 'window'.

evening.name: Cocktails at La Factoria
evening.desc: World-renowned bar with craft cocktails in romantic ambiance.

evening.name: Farewell Dinner at Cocina Abierta
evening.desc: Farm-to-table restaurant perfect for a romantic final meal.

days.tip: La Factoria gets extremely busy after 9 PM, so arrive earlier for a more intimate experience and shorter wait times.

days.intro: Final morning in paradise with last-minute shopping and airport transfer.

morning.name: Final Beach Walk
morning.desc: One last romantic stroll on your favorite beach.

morning.name: Souvenir Shopping
morning.desc: Pick up local crafts and coffee at Plaza Las Americas.

afternoon.name: Airport Transfer
afternoon.desc: Depart for Luis Muñoz Marín International Airport.

days.tip: Arrive at the airport 3 hours early for international flights and pack any liquid souvenirs in checked luggage.

food.intro: San Juan's culinary scene blends traditional Puerto Rican flavors with international influences, offering excellent vegetarian options.
food.tip: Many restaurants offer excellent vegetarian versions of traditional dishes like mofongo - always ask about plant-based options as they're often not listed on English menus.

neighborhoods.name: Old San Juan
neighborhoods.desc: Historic charm with cobblestone streets and colonial architecture
neighborhoods.whyStay: Immersive cultural experience with walking access to major attractions

neighborhoods.name: Condado
neighborhoods.desc: Upscale beachfront district with luxury hotels and dining
neighborhoods.whyStay: Perfect blend of beach relaxation and urban sophistication

neighborhoods.name: Isla Verde
neighborhoods.desc: Beach resort area near the airport with pristine sand
neighborhoods.bestFor: Beach lovers and easy airport access
neighborhoods.whyStay: Best beaches with resort amenities and water sports

midRange.name: Coral Princess Hotel
midRange.vibe: Beachfront with ocean views and pool

luxury.name: La Concha Renaissance San Juan Resort
luxury.vibe: Iconic beachfront resort with modern amenities

luxury.name: El Convento
luxury.vibe: Historic luxury in a converted 17th-century convent

hotels.tip: Book accommodations in Condado for the best balance of beach access, dining options, and LGBTQ+ friendly atmosphere.

getYourGuide.name: El Yunque Rainforest Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Full-day guided tour with waterfalls, hiking, and transportation included.

getYourGuide.name: Culebra Island Day Trip
getYourGuide.desc: Ferry transportation and beach access to pristine Flamenco Beach.

getYourGuide.name: Old San Juan Food Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Walking tour combining history with traditional Puerto Rican cuisine tastings.

hiddenGems.name: Cueva Ventana
hiddenGems.desc: Cave system with spectacular valley views through natural rock window.

hiddenGems.name: Paseo de la Princesa
hiddenGems.desc: Romantic waterfront promenade perfect for sunset walks.

hiddenGems.name: Casa Blanca
hiddenGems.desc: Peaceful historic house museum with beautiful gardens and harbor views.

packing.title: April in San Juan, Puerto Rico
packing.intro: Pack for warm tropical weather with occasional light rain showers and strong Caribbean sun.
packing.luggage: A medium suitcase plus day pack should be sufficient for this tropical beach vacation.
packing.tip: Pack reef-safe sunscreen as regular sunscreen can damage coral reefs during your snorkeling adventures.

bookTrip.intro: Flights from Philadelphia to San Juan typically cost $300-500 per person depending on booking timing.
